description: Test prompts for AI Email Template Generation (templatedetail.vue popup). Prompt must be 10-500 chars.

prompts.prompt: Write a short cold email to introduce our B2B SaaS product to potential customers. Mention a free trial and one key benefit. Keep it under 150 words.
Draft a friendly follow-up email to someone who didn't reply to my first message. Remind them briefly what I offered and ask if they have 5 minutes for a call this week.
Create a monthly product update newsletter. Include a greeting, 3 bullet points of new features, and a clear call-to-action to try the product.
Write a promotional email for a 20% discount on our annual plan. Create urgency with a 7-day deadline and add a clear button-style call to action.
Compose a formal thank-you email to a partner after a successful project. Acknowledge their contribution and suggest a future collaboration.
Create a brief welcome email for new users. Use placeholders for sender name, receiver email, and signup date. Tone should be warm and encouraging.
